rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Omit unsafe Boolean range clauses unless port is explicitly AGREE bool
Do not invent numeric bounds not stated in the requirement
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
